hero.title: Hi, I’m Alanwoko Chikanma. Senior Full‑Stack Engineer.
hero.subtitle: I build fast, scalable, human‑centered digital experiences.

about.title: My Storytelling.
about.subtitle: A journey through code, architecture, and innovation.

chapters.title: The Genesis
chapters.text: It started with a single line of code in a cluttered room. A curiosity for how the digital world ticks evolved into a relentless pursuit of technical mastery.

chapters.title: Building the Foundation
chapters.text: From simple scripts to complex architectures, I spent years mastering the craft of full-stack development. Every bug was a lesson; every deployment, a victory.

chapters.title: Seniority & Vision
chapters.text: As a Senior Engineer, I don't just write code; I architect systems. I focus on scalability, security, and the bridge between high-level business goals and technical reality.

chapters.title: The Human Element
chapters.text: At the end of every network request is a human being. I build experiences that prioritize accessibility and performance, making the web a better place for everyone.

chapters.title: Looking Ahead
chapters.text: The horizon is always moving. I'm currently exploring the intersection of AI and cloud infrastructure, pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the browser.

skills.title: Core Expertise.
skills.subtitle: Modern tech stack focused on performance, scalability, and exceptional user experience.

projects.title: GhostCheck
projects.description: AI-powered Government HR tool that detects ghost workers using biometric verification and attendance anomaly analysis.

projects.title: NAPSS UniLag — Academic Resource & Collaboration Platform
projects.description: Comprehensive academic platform for Political Science students. Centralizes study materials, past questions, and updates.
projects.fullDescription: NAPSS UniLag is a comprehensive academic platform built for Political Science students at the University of Lagos. It centralizes study materials, past questions, assignments, and real‑time academic updates, helping students stay organized and excel academically. I designed, developed, and maintain the entire platform.
projects.impact: Improves academic accessibility and enhances student performance by centralizing all Political Science resources.

projects.title: NAPS UNILAG — Psychology Students Academic Platform
projects.description: Modern academic platform for Psychology students. Provides access to course materials, past questions, and updates.
projects.fullDescription: NAPS UNILAG is a modern academic platform for Psychology students at the University of Lagos. It provides access to course materials, past questions, departmental updates, and student resources. The platform is designed to help students stay organized and improve academic performance through a clean, responsive interface.
projects.impact: Improves access to academic resources and strengthens departmental communication.

projects.title: Resume Genius — AI‑Powered Resume Builder
projects.description: AI-powered resume creation platform for building professional, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes.
projects.fullDescription: Resume Genius is an AI‑powered resume creation platform that helps users generate professional, ATS‑friendly resumes in minutes. It provides structured editing sections, intelligent suggestions, and clean templates with real‑time preview. Users can export their resumes as PDFs and build polished documents without design or writing experience.
projects.impact: Enables users to create professional resumes quickly and effectively, improving job application quality.

projectsSection.title: Selected Work.
projectsSection.subtitle: A collection of premium digital products built with precision and modern engineering principles.

experiences.description: Lead engineer for the core platform architecture. Responsible for scaling frontend micro-services and implementing high-performance API layers.
achievements: Architected and deployed a micro-frontend system using Module Federation.
Reduced overall bundle size by 35% through aggressive code-splitting.
Implemented a real-time analytics engine using WebSockets and Redis.

experiences.description: Key contributor to a multi-tenant SaaS product focused on marketing automation.
achievements: Developed a drag-and-drop workflow builder using React-Flow.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries, improving dashboard load times by 50%.
Built a comprehensive UI component library.
